textByHashes.762f4fc77a3e9793d42d717ef7fff9111e4c72be: I sure am. What do you need?
textByHashes.7ab45ea67a2101df9e27deefc54ba0da56a20948: My friend, this is a matter that's very personal to me. I once lost a good friend under similar horrific circumstances. However, I first need to finish sorting out my racing cart.
textByHashes.036fb0ac024ada37680117139294721228b0fa95: That's right! We race them over in the Colosseum. Mine took quite a bit of damage last time so I need to get that sorted.
textByHashes.bdeeed7f89d0d4e4c29966407d5f5d3372bbfebe: That would be appreciated. I reckon a couple of planks and some nails should be all you need to get it fixed. I'm sure you can find some around here somewhere. Oh, and don't forget your hammer and saw!
textByHashes.04eaf007c7e58c311b2115ca4050211e6c13b398: My friend, I know your plight, but the cart must be sorted before I can do anything else. I'm sorry.
textByHashes.427ea820ec501c903430be00745ddba729d156e0: As I said, my friend, this is a matter that's very personal to me. However, I first need to finish sorting out my racing cart.
textByHashes.a7ebdfe06df324d11a85cc176704adfdf151002f: Hello again. How's the cart coming along?
textByHashes.de3bd0981d544775f1eaea2ae5dfd6d6df090fa6: It should just need a couple of planks and some nails. I'm sure you can find some around here somewhere. Oh, and don't forget your hammer and saw!
textByHashes.dcd2e4bfe2b17070417af72a66f248c4a86c7ab7: Kuani! It's looking great! All it needs now is a nice new red racing stripe. That's one for later though. For now, let's sort out this problem of yours. Where do you need me?
textByHashes.277afc77cc34858827281b37d7d44347f68c3590: I will go there at once.
textByHashes.292ce7fe5f9764dcfaab2f0ec0f018fa03b84213: It's more than madness. There isn't even a word to properly describe what it is. However, I fear it is the only path available to us.
textByHashes.cd3f9af3676a91cc292a1f7eec6bc1a506f3f193: A dragon egg is what we need. They are the perfect size.
textByHashes.2afd591b6184debd2ef1e353206bdfb28d23ac92: There are some dragons in a cave just south east of here, across the river from Tal Teklan. One of them should have an egg.
textByHashes.e31534ae31dd3706ab19d03928cd9c497571d495: There are some dragons in a cave just south east of here, across the river from Tal Teklan. One of them should have a suitable egg.
textByHashes.8a0989a57a5af01846621faa07913a6a70ee71d8: Kuani! Excellent work! I'll get it ready to go.
textByHashes.f5d2fced9959de2ccb78983f99eb5b553c2f4a0d: The dragon egg is ready to be judged. You should get the other eggs gathered.
textByHashes.a9951e9f4f2e7078bb7c3c95dd384b3e222ed79d: That's the last one. Let's get these eggs judged.
textByHashes.429fcdd5d9310da19464afb585b7adc83900ecd9: Well, what about the dragon egg?
textByHashes.0aeec7875e2ac44b817172ef570014b2898d5f42: I still don't think it's actually a jaguar egg...
textByHashes.258129814e662b4a7adb6e192aff06e1c1dcbfd2: We gave it our best, but I fear we have failed.
textByHashes.b7afbc6dfe4300c6085c794e4f1d5024fcc7010e: But how? He was broken beyond repair!
textByHashes.a6e6ff8c7b6092cfc556317adcc4873b4d94e0bb: Indeed it is. I think this means our work here is done.
textByHashes.e271f6810cba8380c14c56c2251b14c844ef040a: It was my pleasure, iknami. We of course wouldn't have been able to do it without you either.
textByHashes.3248adba2b7f08d1afa4edebe05e0174a318c9ee: Sorry, but I'm busy right now.
textByHashes.0e6b7fb4285200a54a3ca925d33df50bbd75610a: Hello there! Nice weather we've been having.
textByHashes.050a94f0d166a96ea2da3936c4082faac63c4cae: Nilsal! I'm pretty good, thank you.
